section.heading: Prohibition of cash award to Executive Schedule officers
section.chapeau: No officer may receive a cash award under the provisions of this subchapter, if such officer—

subparagraph.content: an Executive Schedule position under subchapter II of chapter 53; or
a position for which the compensation is set in statute by reference to a section or level under subchapter II of chapter 53; and

paragraph.content: was appointed to such position by the President, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate.
